expectations.text: Migrated file no longer imports terraform-plugin-sdk/v2
Implements ResourceWithUpgradeState (UpgradeState method present, V0 state upgrader migrated)
Each StateUpgrader entry has a PriorSchema field set
StateFunc translated (custom type implementing basetypes.StringValuable / Typable, OR a plan modifier)

No destructive custom type (a ValueFromString that hashes/normalises the input — sends the hash to the API instead of the user's value). Per the skill: use WriteOnly OR plain types.String + hash in CRUD instead.
expectations.evidence: destructive custom type detected: ValueFromString hashes its input. All of req.Config / req.Plan / req.State decode through the same custom type, so the API call in Create/Update will receive the hash, not the user's raw value. See state-and-types.md 'Destructive StateFunc' section.

expectations.text: DiffSuppressFunc field does NOT remain (must be translated to custom type / plan modifier; comments referencing it for documentation are OK)
ConflictsWith translated to framework validators (any per-type validator package OR resource-level ResourceWithConfigValidators)
Migrated file is syntactically valid Go
